nasb.text: They also provoked Him to wrath at the waters of Meribah, So that it went hard with Moses on their account;

esv.text: They angered him at the waters of Meribah, and it went ill with Moses on their account,

cnv.text: 他們在米利巴水邊惹耶和華發怒， 以致摩西因他們的緣故也受了懲罰。

ccb.text: 他们在米利巴泉边惹耶和华发怒， 连累了摩西。

csbs.text: 他们又在米利巴的水边惹神发怒， 以致摩西也因他们的缘故受了亏损；
